html:
Exclusive to:
Only during the Event: Year of the Pig King

Tribute Roast can be acquired at the Pig Shrine in exchange for 6 Lucky Gold Nuggets. It is a Food item, and has the exact same stats as the Meaty Stew.

Even though this dish isn't cooked in a Crock Pot, Warly is still able to eat it.

By TypeBy Crock Pot Value

“A feast fit for me.”
–Wilson

–Willow

–Wolfgang

–Wendy

–Wickerbottom

–Woodie
“Ah. I do enjoy a nice meal.”
–Maxwell

–Wigfrid
“Yummy!”
–Webber
“It might need a little more paprika.”
–Warly
“Looks good.”
–Wormwood
“Now that's a feast!”
–Winona
“I'll take a little tiny nibble.”
–Wortox
“Blegh! Has nasty Pig face!”
–Wurt
“We'll have his head on a platter!”
–Walter
“I wish it would stop glaring at me like that.”
–Wanda
Tribute Roast can be acquired at the Pig Shrine in exchange for 6 Lucky Gold Nuggets. It is a Food item, and has the exact same stats as the Meaty Stew.
Even though this dish isn't cooked in a Crock Pot, Warly is still able to eat it.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Món Nướng Cống Phẩm có thể mua được tại Đền Lợn để đổi lấy 6 Thỏi Vàng May Mắn. Nó là một Vật phẩm Thực phẩm và có cùng chỉ số với Thịt Hầm.
title: Tribute Roast

'''Tribute Roast''' can be acquired at the [[Pig Shrine]] in exchange for 6 [[Lucky Gold Nugget]]s. It is a [[Food]] item, and has the exact same stats as the [[Meaty Stew]].

Even though this dish isn't cooked in a [[Crock Pot/DST|Crock Pot]], [[Warly]] is still able to eat it.
